nasb.text: The words of Nehemiah the son of Hacaliah. Now it happened in the month Chislev, in the twentieth year, while I was in Susa the capitol,

esv.text: The words of Nehemiah the son of Hacaliah. Now it happened in the month of Chislev, in the twentieth year, as I was in Susa the citadel,

cnv.text: 哈迦利亞的兒子尼希米的言行錄：亞達薛西王二十年基斯流月，我在書珊宮中，

ccb.text: 以下是哈迦利亚的儿子尼希米的记述。 波斯王亚达薛西二十年基斯流月，我在书珊城里。
